title: JavaScript Animation Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of requestAnimationFrame, setInterval, and CSS-based animation in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the modern standard way to create smooth, high-performance animations in JavaScript?
What is a major advantage of using requestAnimationFrame over setInterval?
options: It's synchronized with the browser's refresh rate (typically 60fps).
It can only be used with CSS classes.

questions.question: According to the article, when should you prefer CSS animations over JavaScript ones?
options: For simple animations like hover effects and loaders.
For animations that respond to real-time mouse movement.

questions.question: If you want to move an element from point A to point B once, what is the best way to do it?
options: Use a for loop that changes the style directly.

questions.question: Can you use JavaScript to control CSS properties like 'left', 'opacity', or 'transform' for animation?
options: Yes, but you must use jQuery.
